required_checks: Every generated page must have one canonical URL on the target domain.
Every guide/tool/download page must include at least one official or trusted source block.
No England-only wording on Wales or Scotland jurisdiction pages.
No local council/building-control-body pages until a reliable data source exists.
No sitewide cross-link footer between UKPlanningGuide and BuildingRegsGuide.
Every internal link must exist in the route registry or be deliberately marked external.
Tool result states must point to at least one guide and one printable asset.
Approved Document pages must display last verified date and source ID.
Download pages must be HTML-first and printable, not PDF-only.
Validation must fail on missing source_ids, duplicate slugs, duplicate paths and missing titles.
metadata_policy: Answer-first titles. Avoid copying UKPlanningGuide planning-permission patterns. Target building-control decisions, evidence, certificates and approval route uncertainty.
